input: My laptop won't connect to WiFi since this morning.
I forgot my Active Directory password and can't log in.
The entire office network is down — nobody can access any internal systems.
My Slack keeps crashing on macOS 14.
I need access to the finance shared drive for the new project.
My external monitor shows no signal when connected via HDMI.
Microsoft Office license expired and I can't open any documents.
I received a suspicious phishing email with a malicious link. I did not click it.
My VPN disconnects every time my laptop goes to sleep.
Teams microphone and camera are not working during meetings.
I need access to the SAP HR module for my new responsibilities as team lead. My manager has approved it.
I forgot my SSO password and cannot log into any company applications.
My docking station is not being detected — no monitors or peripherals work.
The production server is down and the entire development team cannot work. This is a critical outage.
This issue is related to a GDPR compliance requirement — please check user access logs for the audit.
